title: Raw soil carbon dioxide, moisture, and temperature data from a mixed conifer and aspen forest stands in the East River Watershed of Colorado June 2011-December 2021.

data_payload_files.file_notes: Headerless CSV; columns inferred from the conifer header and package metadata headers file description. Contains hourly records for the deciduous/aspen forest stand.
Headered CSV; contains hourly records for the mixed conifer forest stand.

location_resolution.notes: ESS-DIVE spatialCoverage reports the two soil pits are within 15 meters of each other at 38.9592 N, -106.9898 W, elevation 2880 m.

time_series_inference.reasoning: Package metadata states soil temperature, moisture, and CO2 were recorded each hour; sorted timestamp differences are predominantly 60 minutes.

experimental_context.notes: Dataset compares adjacent natural mixed-conifer and deciduous/aspen stands; no warming, irrigation, drought, fertilization, or other manipulation was reported.

similar_dataset_reference.reason: Wide hourly sensor time series with VWC depth encoded in column names and site_id encoded by file/source.

open_questions: Source files do not include timezone. Harmonization assumes fixed Mountain Standard Time (UTC-7) for logger timestamps.
Carbone_aspen.csv is headerless in the raw package copy; columns are inferred from Carbone_conifer.csv and the API metadata description of a shared headers file.
Non-leap-year February 29 rows in Carbone_conifer.csv are dropped because they cannot be converted to valid timestamps.
